articles.title: E20 fuel may cut mileage by 3-5 pc but offers cleaner combustion
articles.description: new delhi : petrol blended with 20 per cent ethanol (e20) can reduce fuel economy by 3-5 per cent in some vehicles, the oil ministry said on friday, but argued the impact is outweighed by benefits, including a higher octane rating,

articles.description: The United States also stepped up demands that Iran stop attacks on ships in the Strait of Hormuz, where recent hostilities have pushed oil prices higher.

articles.title: Pakistan braces for another fuel blow as global oil surge threatens petrol, diesel price hike
articles.description: The petrol and diesel prices in Pakistan are likely to witness a rise due to recent surge in crude oil rates in global market, ARY News reported.

articles.title: High Stakes Negotiations: Iran-US Tensions Flare Amid Strait of Hormuz Crisis
articles.description: President Donald Trump announced that talks would continue between the U.S. and Iran despite the recent escalation in tensions. Hostilities have risen, especially concerning the Strait of Hormuz, affecting oil prices. Both countries are engaged in a tit-for-tat that has international implications, notably on global oil supply and political stability.

articles.title: Ukraine destroys 49 of Russia's shadow fleet ships in crippling strikes
articles.description: Vladimir Putin's shadow fleet was rocked by 14 new attacks today as the chaos at Russia’s petrol stations deepens.

articles.title: Occidental's quarterly realized oil prices jump amid Iran war disruption
articles.description: Shale producer Occidental Petroleum said in a filing on Friday its worldwide average ​realized oil prices rose 38.4% in ‌the second quarter compared with the previous three months, driven by higher benchmark crude ​rates amid the Middle East conflict.

articles.title: Stocks Surge Amid AI Enthusiasm Despite U.S.-Iran Tensions
articles.description: Stocks rose with AI-related optimism, despite U.S.-Iran tensions. The Dow, S&P 500, and Nasdaq ended higher. SK Hynix's market debut soared, benefiting from AI chip demand. Oil prices slipped amid conflict concerns. The Japanese yen strengthened, while U.S. dollar remained stable, eyeing interest rate movements.

articles.title: Rate cuts could come earlier than expected - but there's a catch
articles.description: One of Australia's leading banks says rate cuts could come sooner than expected. Plus: petrol prices, a big ASX IPO and a Telstra outage.
